projects.title: Dream.OS
projects.one_line: The operating spine for task lanes, verification gates, closeouts, and multi-agent workflow control.
projects.proof: Command center, project index, tasks board, skill tree, and closeout feed are deployed as static routes.
projects.next_unlock: Automate public-safe data exports into the route data contract.

projects.title: WeAreSwarm Command Center
projects.one_line: Public proof surface for Dream.OS closeouts, project cards, task lanes, and capability unlocks.
projects.proof: This deploy includes all_tasks, kids_tasks, projects, next_lane, skill_tree, and closeouts JSON files.
projects.next_unlock: Connect the exporter to live repo scanner and closeout sources.

projects.title: Crosby Ultimate Events
projects.one_line: Private chef and event services site recovered from HTTP 500 with inquiry capture.
projects.proof: HTTP 500 to HTTP 200 recovery, CSV capture pass, private access blocked, Discord closeout accepted.
projects.next_unlock: Publish before/after proof and package as a repeatable rescue offer.

projects.title: MZspark / Spark Protocol
projects.one_line: Character generation, Spark lore, battle cards, and future kid-led mission systems.
projects.proof: Character generator and Spark battle components exist in runtime plugin and content lanes.
projects.next_unlock: Connect kids-safe planner missions to Spark creative tasks.
